text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Can I get the B combo with a salad as the side?

text_block_list.name: Cafe Lady
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh, I'm sorry! Looks like we only have the A
combo left, dearie.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What? That's the deep-fried stuff, isn't it? In that
case...

text_block_list.name: Cafe Lady
text_block_list.text:
And the only side left is the bucket of fries... But
you're a growing girl, so you should eat up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin doesn't look very well...
